title: Stupid Mario Bros 2 Remastered
description:
Commentary here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qFKrz0a_pOU

Like I already said, it's Mario's 25th anniversary so I figured I'd finally upload all of my Stupid Mario sprite animations to YouTube. This is the second episode, and personally my least favourite of the bunch. It was a real rush job, which you can probably tell (the first one was as well, since I literally made it start to finish in a single day, but this one just annoys me more.) Well, anyway, I tidied up the frame rate and video / sound quality, though some scenes are still a little awkward and jerky (the nightmare world scene was a nightmare.) 

More Stupid Marioz:
Stupid Mario Bros 1 http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wgn4HolVA_Q
Stupid Mario Bros 3 http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TOm_i9n1jjU
